package rulecoverage

func NegativeTestFixtureBuildersLiveInProductionPackages() string {
    ruleID := "test_fixture_builders_live_in_production_packages"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Fixture and factory helpers defined in non-test production files."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
